investment_vault.fund_project.cross_contract_call_note: One get_project() call; total_projects() removed (#87). Saves ~1 cross-contract call overhead per invocation.

storage_key_sizes.note: Key bytes are XDR Symbol overhead + variant name length (#82). Shorter names reduce per-entry rent.

project_registry.Arch(u32).note: Compact archive key — 4-char name demonstrates compact key pattern (#73, #82)

investment_vault.CachedTotalAssets.note: Moved to instance (#85): read/written on every state change, no separate rent needed
